message:
fix: region begin_finalize simplification, gRPC doc link, resolve merge conflict

region.rs:
  Replace if/else with chained OR for begin_finalize() state
  transitions — try Closing→Finalizing first, then fall back to
  Draining→Finalizing. Semantically equivalent but more concise
  and eliminates an unnecessary load-then-branch.

web.rs:
  Update gRPC-Web protocol doc link from `master` to `main` branch
  to match upstream grpc/grpc repository default branch rename.

mutation.rs:
  Resolve merge conflict markers (<<<<<<< / ======= / >>>>>>>) left
  from a prior stash pop. Keeps the "Updated upstream" side which
  uses actor(100)/actor(200)/actor(300) IDs matching the rest of the
  test harness conventions, and includes the rref_access oracle test
  functions that were only present in the upstream version.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
